This extension configures the browser for cobas infinity IT solutions

The navify® Lab Operations extension for Chrome is required to work with navify® Lab Operations. The extension automatically configures the necessary settings to avoid any issues caused by browser restrictions.

The extension enables the following permissions for the navify Lab Operations domain specified by the Roche Service Representative.

- Cookies: The extension uses session-only cookies to know about the user and to keep the session  active. The cookies are also needed to keep the user preferences in the session, which are used for the default access for some screens.

- The cookies are removed when the browser is closed. This makes the browser more secure.

- Images: The extension uses images for the visualization purposes. It is required in some of the tests that are linked to images.

- Popups: The extension uses popups to manage specific steps, actions and risk control measures such as warnings for patient safety.

- JavaScript: The extension uses JavaScript for some automatic (dynamic) options such as to activate buttons.

- Clear Cache: The extension clears the cache to remove the old cached versions and to ensure that only the current and new javascript files and images are used. 

- Open and close tabs: The extension also helps to open the application in full screen mode in a single tab and to close the unrequired tab.

It is also recommended to whitelist the navify Lab Operations server IP address and hostname/DNS. This ensures the extension is activated only on the navify Lab Operations server.

네이버페이 포인트 줍줍 시즌 2 (Npay Moa Season 2)
네이버페이 포인트를 쉽게 모을 수 있도록 도와주는 짠테크 프로그램입니다.

[ 1.3.0 ] 기존수집선택 을 저장하고, 1포인트만 수집하는 기능을 추가.
[ 1.2.4 ] 전체 클릭이 아닌 포인트를 체크 해서 적립 하도록 수정함
[ 1.2.3 ] 쿠팡광고에 대한 문구 추가
[ 1.2.2 ] 2025년 10월 8일 스타일쉬트 변경
[ 1.2.1 ] 2025년 9월 29일 네이버포인트 페이지 내부 버튼 오류로 인해 제거
[ 1.2.0 ] 2025년 6월 27일 네이버포인트 클릭 버튼 변경됨
[ 1.0.3 ] 2025년 6월 26일 네이버포인트 적립페이지 URL 및 내용이 변경 되어 업데이트 

네이버페이 포인트 혜택 페이지에 적립할수 있는 클릭을 찾아서 똑똑하고, 꼼꼼하게 자동클릭으로 적립 하여 드립니다.

그리고 완료시 화면으로 포인트가 적입이 되었다는것을 표현 했습니다.

Doc Edit Replay - AI Detector & Originality Checker for Google Docs
The ultimate revision history tool for Google Docs. Replay edits & use AI to verify originality and detect AI-written content.

Unlock the True Story Behind Every Google Doc with Revision History.

Ever wondered about the true creation process of a Google Doc? Go beyond the standard version history with Revision History, a powerful Chrome extension that provides a detailed, visual, and AI-powered analysis of any document's evolution. Our tool is designed to bring unparalleled transparency and integrity to your writing and review process.

Key Features:
🔹 Visual History Playback
Don't just read through changes—watch them happen. Revision History lets you replay the entire writing process like a video. See every keystroke, deletion, and paste in chronological order, giving you a clear and intuitive understanding of how the document was built from the ground up.

🔹 Advanced AI-Powered Analysis
Click the "Details" button to access our cutting-edge analysis dashboard. Our AI delves deep into the document's history to provide critical insights:
AI Writing Probability: In an age of AI-generated text, our tool assesses the likelihood that the content was written by an AI model, helping to ensure human authorship.
Natural Typing Analysis: We analyze the typing cadence and speed patterns to determine the probability that the document was typed at a normal, human pace.
Originality Probability: Get a confidence score on the document's originality, helping you identify potential plagiarism or heavy reliance on pasted content.
Intelligent Summary: Instantly generate a concise summary of the entire document, perfect for a quick overview.

🔹 Detailed Writing Metrics
Our integrated toolbar gives you at-a-glance data to understand the effort behind the words:
Writing Time: Track the total active time spent editing the document.
Sessions: See a complete breakdown of all individual editing sessions, including their duration and timing.
Pastes: Monitor the number and volume of paste events, a key indicator for assessing originality.
Seamlessly Integrated:
Revision History adds a clean and intuitive menu to your Google Docs interface without getting in the way. It feels like a native part of the Google Docs experience.

Who is Revision History For?
🔹Educators & Teachers: Uphold academic integrity by verifying that student work is original and authentically created. Easily detect potential use of AI writers or plagiarism.
🔹Students: Showcase your hard work and the integrity of your writing process. Provide proof of your original effort on important assignments.
🔹Editors & Publishers: Quickly assess the authenticity of submissions and ensure that the content you are reviewing is original.
🔹Collaborative Teams: Maintain transparency and accountability in shared documents. Understand who contributed what and how the document evolved over time.

Privacy Policy
Your data is never shared with anyone, including plugin owners. We strictly adhere to privacy laws, including GDPR and California Privacy Law, to protect your information. All uploaded data is automatically deleted every day.
Install Revision History today and bring a new level of clarity, trust, and integrity to your Google Docs workflow.

A tab manager that organizes tabs based on your mood

Overview: Are you overwhelmed by countless open tabs? Struggling to focus on your tasks with all those distractions? Meet the Mood-Based Tab Manager, your ultimate solution for better tab management and increased productivity. This Chrome extension lets you organise and manage your tabs based on your current mood or focus level, helping you to stay on track with your tasks.

Key Features:
Mood Categories: Define and switch between mood categories like "Work," "Relax," "Social," and more. Customise each mood with specific tabs to suit your workflow.

Customisable Moods: Personalise your mood categories by assigning specific websites and settings to each mood. Tailor the experience to match your needs.

Site Management: Pre-assign moods to specific sites, ensuring that your tabs are automatically organised when you visit them. 


Tab Management: Seamlessly switch between moods, with the extension automatically grouping and hiding tabs that don't fit the selected mood. Supports multi-mood selection for those who juggle multiple tasks.

User-Friendly Interface: Enjoy a clean and intuitive interface for selecting moods, managing tabs, and adjusting settings.

DND Mode (Do Not Disturb): Activate DND mode to block all notifications from websites, ensuring complete focus on your tasks.

Shortcuts:  Easily manage and switch between moods with customisable keyboard shortcuts, allowing you to quickly organise your tabs based on your current focus or activity.

Why Choose Mood-Based Tab Manager? This extension simplifies your browsing experience by categorising your tabs according to your current mood, making it easier to focus on what’s important. Whether you're working, relaxing, or socialising, you can ensure that only the relevant tabs are visible, reducing distractions and boosting productivity.


Using Mood-Based Tab Manager:

Switching Moods:
  Click on the extension icon and select your current mood from the list.
  The extension will automatically group and hide tabs that don’t match the selected 
  mood. You can select multiple moods if needed.

Site Management:
  Pre-assign moods to specific websites via the "Site Management" tab in the 
  settings menu.This ensures that tabs related to these sites are automatically organised based on the assigned mood.

DND Mode (Do Not Disturb):
 Activate DND mode by selecting it from the mood list.While DND is active, all notifications from websites will be blocked, allowing you to focus without 
 interruptions.


Future Features (Coming Soon):
 Mood Tracker Integration: The extension will soon integrate with mood tracking 
   apps to automatically adjust your tab organisation based on your mood.

AI-Driven Suggestions: Get personalised suggestions for mood settings based on your browsing history, enhancing the extension’s adaptability.

Memory Optimisation: Memory optimisation through advanced tab discarding will be available to reduce the system load, making your browsing experience smoother.
Phonaify helps users not only learn word meanings and synonyms but also, most importantly, improve their English pronunciation…

Phonaify helps users not only learn word meanings and synonyms but also, most importantly, improve their English pronunciation while reading naturally online.

By simply highlighting any word, users can listen to its pronunciation, speak into the microphone, and receive instant phonetic feedback—all without leaving the page.

How to Use Phonaify:
1. Open any webpage (e.g., Wikipedia).
2. Highlight a word you want to test.
3. Click the Phonaify icon that appears next to the word.
4. Explore the popup:
     - Press the sound icon to listen to the pronunciation.
     - Adjust playback speed with the speed icon.
     - Press the microphone icon to speak.
     - Wait for feedback to appear, refine your pronunciation based on the suggestions, and try speaking again.
Automatically blocks camera and microphone by default on Google Meet.

Meet Default Off automatically manages camera and microphone permissions for Google Meet, giving you control over your privacy by default.

KEY FEATURES:
• Dual Blocking Methods: Choose between browser-level permissions or keyboard shortcuts for maximum flexibility
• Smart State Detection: Automatically detects current camera/mic state and toggles intelligently
• Keyboard Shortcuts: Use Ctrl+E (video) and Ctrl+D (mic) to toggle states quickly
• Automatic Fallback: Falls back to button clicking if keyboard shortcuts fail
• Real-Time Status Badge: Visual indicator shows current camera/mic state at a glance
• Persistent Settings: Your preferences are saved and synced across all Chrome browsers

HOW IT WORKS:
Configure your default camera and microphone settings through the extension popup. Choose to block or allow camera/microphone access by default when joining Google Meet sessions. The extension applies your preferences automatically, ensuring you maintain control over your privacy.

PRIVACY-FOCUSED:
• No data collection - operates entirely locally
• Only affects Google Meet permissions
• Open source and transparent
• Minimal permissions required

Perfect for privacy-conscious users who want to prevent accidental camera or microphone activation during Google Meet calls.

Selector de contenidos para porcinnova. Una vez entrado en una página, es posible llamar a la extensión y si se cumplen determinados patrones en el HTML en ella, la extensión selecciona estos patrones HTML. El texto de los HTML's identificados es posibles enviarlo a la web de porcinnova para generar métricas. Previo al envío, es posible indicar que elementos entre los detectados van a ser objeto de envío. Esto se realiza mostrando en la extensión una lista seleccionables de los patrones seleccionados. 

Para el uso de dicha extensión, es necesario tener un usuario en la web de porcinnova, para poder loguearse en dicha extensión.
Scans and cleans suspicious website notification permissions. Protects against spam and scam ads in real-time.

Are you tired of receiving fake virus alerts, click-bait advertisements, and adult content notifications on your desktop? Deceptive websites often trick you into clicking "Allow Notifications" using fake captcha prompts or urgent security warnings. Once allowed, they flood you with annoying spam popups.

NotiSpam Cleaner is a privacy-first, lightweight tool designed to scan and clean notification settings in Google Chrome, protecting you from notification abuse.

KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS
- 100% Privacy-First & Open-Source (Security & Transparency):
All scans and blocks are processed strictly on your local machine. Absolutely zero data is collected or sent off-device. As a fully open-source extension (MIT License), our code is publicly hosted on GitHub for anyone to audit and verify.
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/mah-jp/notispam-cleaner

- Scan & One-Click Clean:
Instantly audit your allowed notifications list. The extension automatically separates "Trusted" sites (like Google, Slack, Teams) from "Suspicious/Unknown" ones, letting you revoke permissions from all suspicious sites at once while keeping your trusted ones intact.

- Real-Time Guard & Silent Protection:
Actively monitors notification permission changes. When a suspicious site gets allowed, the extension detects it instantly and blocks it. Includes a "Silent Protection" mode to auto-block notifications in the background without showing any alerts—ideal for family members' PCs.

HOW TO USE IT
1. Click the NotiSpam Cleaner icon in your toolbar.
2. Click "Scan Allowed Sites" to analyze notification permissions.
3. Review "Suspicious / Unknown" sites and click "Clean All Suspicious Sites" to block them.
4. Keep the "Real-time Guard" toggle active to get alert popups if you accidentally allow a suspicious site in the future.

IMPORTANT NOTES & LIMITATIONS
- Not an Adblocker: This extension specifically blocks annoying popups generated through Chrome's native push notifications. It is not designed to block general web page advertisements (like banners or video ads).
- Technical Limitation: Due to Chrome security constraints, extensions cannot retrieve a bulk list of all custom notification settings. NotiSpam Cleaner discovers sites by cross-referencing allowed rules with your local history, bookmarks, and open tabs. Very old allowed sites that are no longer in your history or bookmarks may not be scanned. You can view the full raw database link inside the extension to review all rules manually.

VRM 音声認識を用いた多機能マウスジェスチャ
音声認識を用いてテキストに音声入力したり、Chromeの利便性を高めるためのマウスジェスチャです。

この拡張機能は音声入力ができる多機能マウスジェスチャで、以下の機能があります。
Chromeに表示されたテキスト・テキストエリアに音声入力
音声入力でグーグル検索
音声入力できるメモ
音声を再生しているタブをミュートにする、ミュートを解除する
ページの上下にスクロール、ページのトップとボトムにスクロール
コピー＆ペースト
Chromeを最小化する
履歴を戻る
履歴を進む
タブを閉じる
ページを再読み込みする

※https:で始まるサイトだけに対応しています。
※音声認識が制限されたサイトでは、この機能は動作しません。
※ほとんどのテキストに音声入力できますが、一部のテキストには対応していません。
